{"file_path": "/Users/hana/eglepoint/w2t71/repo/run_tests.sh", "content": "#!/bin/bash
#
# ResearchHub - Test Runner
# Runs Unit, Integration, and Frontend test suites.
# Detects whether PHP is local or needs Docker, then runs accordingly.
#
set -uo pipefail

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
BOLD='\033[1m'
NC='\033[0m'

pass() { echo -e "  ${GREEN}PASS${NC} $1"; }
fail() { echo -e "  ${RED}FAIL${NC} $1"; }

# Detect runtime: local PHP or Docker
if command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    RUN="php"
else
    if ! docker compose ps app --format '{{.State}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "running"; then
        echo -e "${RED}No local PHP and Docker app container is not running.${NC}"
        echo "  Start Docker first:  docker compose up -d"
        exit 1
    fi
    RUN="docker compose exec -T app php"
fi

echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}================================================${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}  ResearchHub - Test Runner${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}================================================${NC}"

# ─── Unit Tests ───
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}[1/3] Unit Tests${NC}"
echo "────────────────────────────────────────"
$RUN artisan migrate:fresh --force --quiet 2>/dev/null
$RUN artisan test --testsuite=Unit --colors=always 2>&1
UNIT_EXIT=$?

# ─── Integration Tests (Feature) ───
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}[2/3] Integration Tests${NC}"
echo "────────────────────────────────────────"
$RUN artisan migrate:fresh --force --quiet 2>/dev/null
$RUN artisan test --testsuite=Feature --colors=always 2>&1
FEATURE_EXIT=$?

# ─── Frontend Tests (Livewire Components) ───
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}[3/3] Frontend Tests (Livewire)${NC}"
echo "────────────────────────────────────────"
$RUN artisan migrate:fresh --force --quiet 2>/dev/null
$RUN artisan test --testsuite=Feature --filter="LoginTest|CatalogTest|StepUpAuth|BruteForce|PasswordRotation|SingleLogout" --colors=always 2>&1
FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

# ─── Summary ───
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}================================================${NC}"
[ $UNIT_EXIT -eq 0 ] && pass "Unit tests" || fail "Unit tests"
[ $FEATURE_EXIT -eq 0 ] && pass "Integration tests" || fail "Integration tests"
[ $FRONTEND_EXIT -eq 0 ] && pass "Frontend tests" || fail "Frontend tests"
echo -e "${BOLD}================================================${NC}"
echo ""

TOTAL_EXIT=$((UNIT_EXIT + FEATURE_EXIT + FRONTEND_EXIT))
[ $TOTAL_EXIT -eq 0 ] && echo -e "${GREEN}All test suites passed.${NC}" || echo -e "${RED}Some suites failed.${NC}"
exit $TOTAL_EXIT
"}

content.arguments:
{"file_path": "/Users/hana/eglepoint/w2t71/repo/docker-compose.yml", "content": "name: researchhub

services:
  app:
    build: .
    container_name: researchhub-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      APP_NAME: ResearchHub
      APP_ENV: local
      APP_KEY: base64:rRlGxxED9jGe1SL8tqSiF88I3Wwy5R7JWtiJB/i/tMY=
      APP_DEBUG: "true"
      APP_TIMEZONE: UTC
      APP_URL: http://localhost:4000
      APP_LOCALE: en
      APP_FALLBACK_LOCALE: en
      APP_FAKER_LOCALE: en_US
      APP_MAINTENANCE_DRIVER: file
      BCRYPT_ROUNDS: "12"
      LOG_CHANNEL: stack
      LOG_STACK: single
      LOG_DEPRECATIONS_CHANNEL: "null"
      LOG_LEVEL: debug
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: "5432"
      DB_DATABASE: researchhub
      DB_USERNAME: researchhub
      DB_PASSWORD: researchhub_secret
      SESSION_DRIVER: database
      SESSION_LIFETIME: "20"
      SESSION_ENCRYPT: "true"
      SESSION_PATH: /
      SESSION_DOMAIN: "null"
      BROADCAST_CONNECTION: log
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: redis
      CACHE_STORE: redis
      CACHE_PREFIX: researchhub_
      REDIS_CLIENT: phpredis
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PASSWORD: "null"
      REDIS_PORT: "6379"
      MAIL_MAILER: log
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/var/www/html
      - ./testing/tests:/var/www/html/tests
    networks:
      - researchhub
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.25-alpine
    container_name: researchhub-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "4000:80"
      - "4443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/var/www/html
      - ./docker/nginx/default.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
      - ./docker/nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
    networks:
      - researchhub
    depends_on:
      - app

  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: researchhub-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: researchhub
      POSTGRES_USER: researchhub
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: researchhub_secret
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./docker/postgres/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql
    networks:
      - researchhub
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U researchhub -d researchhub"]
      interval: 3s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 5s

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: researchhub-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    networks:
      - researchhub
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 3s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5

  queue:
    build: .
    container_name: researchhub-queue
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      APP_NAME: ResearchHub
      APP_ENV: local
      APP_KEY: base64:rRlGxxED9jGe1SL8tqSiF88I3Wwy5R7JWtiJB/i/tMY=
      APP_DEBUG: "true"
      APP_TIMEZONE: UTC
      APP_URL: http://localhost:4000
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: "5432"

services:
  app:
    build: .

      APP_DEBUG: "true"
      APP_TIMEZONE: UTC
      APP_URL: http://localhost:4000
      APP_LOCALE: en
      APP_FALLBACK_LOCALE: en
      APP_FAKER_LOCALE: en_US
      APP_MAINTENANCE_DRIVER: file
      BCRYPT_ROUNDS: "12"
      LOG_CHANNEL: stack
      LOG_STACK: single
      LOG_DEPRECATIONS_CHANNEL: "null"
      LOG_LEVEL: debug
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: "5432"
      DB_DATABASE: researchhub
      DB_USERNAME: researchhub
      DB_PASSWORD: researchhub_secret
      SESSION_DRIVER: database
      SESSION_LIFETIME: "20"
      SESSION_ENCRYPT: "true"
      SESSION_PATH: /
      SESSION_DOMAIN: "null"
      BROADCAST_CONNECTION: log
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: redis
      CACHE_STORE: redis
      CACHE_PREFIX: researchhub_
      REDIS_CLIENT: phpredis
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PASSWORD: "null"
      REDIS_PORT: "6379"
      MAIL_MAILER: log
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/var/www/html

      - researchhub

      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.25-alpine
    container_name: researchhub-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "4000:80"
      - "4443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/var/www/html
      - ./docker/nginx/default.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
      - ./docker/nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
    networks:
      - researchhub
    depends_on:
      - app

  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: researchhub-db
    restart: unless-stopped

      POSTGRES_DB: researchhub
      POSTGRES_USER: researchhub
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: researchhub_secret
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

      - researchhub

      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U researchhub -d researchhub"]
      interval: 3s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 5s

  redis:

    container_name: researchhub-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    networks:
      - researchhub

      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]

      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5

  queue:

    container_name: researchhub-queue
    restart: unless-stopped
